name: Car Wash Simulator Game
description: Car Wash Simulator ek fun aur satisfying game hai jismein aap dirty cars ko wash, repair aur shine karte ho. Is game mein aapko real car washing experience milta hai jahan aap soap, water, brush aur tools use karke cars ko bilkul new jaisa bana dete ho. Game ke colorful graphics aur smooth controls isay har age ke players ke liye enjoyable banate hain. Har level ke sath new cars aur challenges unlock hote hain jo game ko aur zyada exciting bana dete hain.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
